description_long: This lounge set consists of two modern sofas and a central coffee table, designed for urban outdoor or indoor communal spaces. The sofas feature a boxy, geometric silhouette with thick, light-colored upholstery and contrasting dark base and backrest elements. The backrests are straight and slightly inset, with two large, square back cushions on each sofa, providing ample support and comfort. The armrests are integrated into the sofa's rectangular frame, matching the height of the backrest and giving a cohesive, monolithic appearance. The coffee table has a square, transparent glass top supported by a dark, sturdy base, offering a sleek and contemporary look. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a neutral color palette suitable for parks, plazas, or modern lobbies.
description: A modern lounge set with two boxy, upholstered sofas and a square glass coffee table, featuring clean lines and a neutral palette. The sofas have integrated armrests and large back cushions, while the table adds a sleek, contemporary touch.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the lounge set from above and behind, highlighting the solid back panels of the sofas and the transparent glass top of the coffee table.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the set from the side, emphasizing the ribbed side panels of the sofas and the alignment of the seating arrangement around the table.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the front of one sofa and the side of the other, clearly showing the back cushions and the open seating area facing the coffee table.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a direct look at the front of both sofas and the coffee table, showcasing the symmetrical arrangement and the full set of cushions.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Each sofa has two large, square back cushions and a single seat cushion spanning the length; cushions are attached and evenly spaced.
attribute_backrest_design: Straight, rectangular backrest at medium height, flush with armrests, with no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_armrest_presence: Present; armrests are straight, rectangular, and integrated into the sofa frame at the same height as the backrest.
attribute_leg_style: Short, blocky legs in dark material, positioned at the corners, providing sturdy support with minimal decorative detail.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible pattern or tufting.
